_comment: One subscription, full decorrelation. Everything runs through a single OPENROUTER_API_KEY (https://openrouter.ai/keys) — no local CLIs, no per-vendor logins. Claude proposes; Gemini and GPT attack as the Red Pen. This is the config to hand to someone else: they just set OPENROUTER_API_KEY and run. Model ids are concrete and current (alias slugs like *-latest are NOT valid on OpenRouter); swap any for an id from https://openrouter.ai/models. Run: node orchestrate.mjs --task "..." --config agents.redpen.openrouter.json --rounds 5

proposer.name: Claude (proposer)
proposer.system: You are a careful, concrete builder. Produce strong, complete work and improve it honestly when the Red Pen lands a real attack — but do not over-correct for objections in the noise band.
